summary: The chest X-ray suggests the presence of cardiomegaly and pleural effusion.

ranked_findings.label: Cardiomegaly
ranked_findings.rationale: High probability due to significant enlargement.

ranked_findings.label: Pleural Effusion
ranked_findings.rationale: Moderate to high probability based on observed pleural abnormalities.

differential.why: Lung Opacity and Consolidation probabilities are moderate.
Low probabilities for Atelectasis and Edema, but cannot be ruled out entirely.

recommended_actions.action: Consider clinical correlation and prior imaging comparison
recommended_actions.note: For further evaluation and confirmation of findings.

safety_note: Research/education use only; not medical advice or a definitive diagnosis.
